case_title: GREER, VERNON VS CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAY-03-2005, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JUN-14-2005 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 FOR FURTHER TRIAL PER PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST.
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY GREER, VERNON AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-03-2005 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUN-14-2005, CONTINUED BY COURT TO AUG-16-2005 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 COMM. ROSEN-PARK RECUSES HERSELF.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GREER, VERNON RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO $1,324.00 PRINCIPAL, $22.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,346.00, DEFT WAIVED SERVICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
DEFT'S REQUEST FOR CONTINUANCE FILED. $10.00 FEE PAID.
